testcase.name: uploading sample audio returns the transcript the proxy responds with
testcase.failure: io.kotest.assertions.AssertionFailedError: expected:<Success(transcript=hello world)> but was:<Failure> at testcase.name: a proxy error response is mapped to a transcription failure
